channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Trump's policies strain long-standing US alliances amid and beyond Iran conflict
item.description: President Donald Trump's decisions during the Iran war, including pulling US troops from Germany, threatening further drawdowns in Europe, and downplaying attacks on Gulf allies like the UAE, are expe...

item.title: Mortal Kombat II: Great Fight Scenes Overshadow Weak Storytelling
item.description: Mortal Kombat II, the 2026 follow-up to the 2021 reboot, delivers on intense action but struggles with its narrative depth. The film introduces Karl Urban as the older Johnny Cage, whose cocky humour ...

item.title: VCK to support TVK in Tamil Nadu government formation
item.description: The Viduthalai Chiruthaigal Katchi (VCK) has formally decided to support C. Joseph Vijay and his party, Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK), for the formation of the new government in Tamil Nadu. The VCK, ...

item.title: Queen Darlene Reveals Her Mother Has Been in Hong Kong Prison for 10 Years
item.description: Queen Darlene, stepsister to Tanzanian music star Diamond Platnumz, recently shared an emotional revelation about her mother, who has been serving a prison sentence in Hong Kong for over a decade. In ...

item.title: Putin Highlights Russian Troops' Role in Ukraine During Scaled-Down Victory Parade
item.description: On 9th May 2026, Russian President Vladimir Putin addressed the annual Victory Day parade in Red Square, describing Russian forces in Ukraine as confronting an 'aggressive' Nato-backed force and affir...

item.title: CMU Students Conduct Field Study in Former NPA Tribal Area in Bukidnon
item.description: COTABATO CITY, Philippines — Around 130 students from Central Mindanao University (CMU) in Maramag, Bukidnon, recently participated in a two-day field study in Barangay Magkalungay, Mount Malimumu, Sa...

item.title: Blind date review: Jonathan, 23, and Katie, 27, share an enjoyable evening but note age gap differences
item.description: In this week's Guardian Blind Date, 23-year-old student Jonathan met 27-year-old environmental campaigner Katie at Town House at The Kensington in London. Both arrived with open minds, hoping for good...

item.title: Efforts Underway to Restore Greater Udzungwa Landscape and Support Local Communities
item.description: Iringa, Tanzania – Environmental stakeholders and government agencies in Tanzania are pushing for stronger partnerships and financial support to implement the Greater Udzungwa Landscape Restoration St...

item.title: Bashir Dalhatu defends tenure and finances amid ACF leadership dispute
item.description: Alhaji Bashir Dalhatu, the Wazirin Dutse and Chairman of the Board of Trustees (BoT) of the Arewa Consultative Forum (ACF), don talk about di wahala wey dey surround im and the ACF. Im clarify say the...

item.title: Winnipeg Police Exam Denial Sparks Debate Over Religious Accommodation
item.description: A Winnipeg man was recently denied the opportunity to write a police entrance exam because he was carrying a kirpan, a ceremonial Sikh dagger, which he wears as part of his religious faith. The incide...

item.title: Mamata Banerjee Updates X Profile After TMC Loss in West Bengal Assembly Elections
item.description: In a significant development following the Trinamool Congress's major defeat in the 2026 West Bengal Assembly elections, Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee has updated her bio on X platform. The new descr...

item.title: Tensions rise between Netanyahu and Trump amid complications in Iran conflict
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu has insisted that he maintains 'full coordination' with US President Donald Trump, despite reports suggesting that Washington has largely excluded Israel from...

item.title: Key Global Events and Moments Captured in Photos (May 2–8, 2026)
item.description: This photo roundup presents a snapshot of major events, personalities, and human-interest moments from around the world between May 2 and 8, 2026. A key highlight is the arrival of Southeast Asian lea...

item.title: Man assaulted outside St. Albert mosque, suspect charged with aggravated assault
item.description: On May 1, 2026, Ali Wahad Noor was assaulted while driving home from the Muslim Association of St. Albert following Friday prayers. According to Noor and witnesses, the attacker followed their vehicle...

item.title: Governor Uzodimma Retains Right to Contest for Senate While Focusing on Imo Governance
item.description: For Imo State and Naija generally, plenty people dey dey talk about whether Governor Hope Uzodimma go contest for Senate come 2027 elections. Some citizens and groups don dey push am, saying him exper...

item.title: Surgical Team Successfully Removes 25-Kilogram Ovarian Tumor from Venezuelan Woman
item.description: A surgical team at the Dr. Luis Razetti University Hospital in Barcelona, Anzoátegui, Venezuela, successfully removed a massive ovarian tumor weighing over 25 kilograms from a 52-year-old woman. The p...

item.title: Heeney leads Sydney Swans to narrow win over North Melbourne
item.description: Sydney maintained their position at the top of the AFL ladder with a hard-fought 16.9 (105) to 14.13 (97) win over North Melbourne at Marvel Stadium. Isaac Heeney was pivotal for the Swans, contributi...

item.title: DStv Stream now hosts popular Showmax Originals for fans
item.description: Even though Showmax don close shop, fans no go lose their favourite shows. All the popular Showmax Originals wey people dey enjoy still dey available for DStv Stream. DStv don create special section f...

item.title: Pedestrians injured in Arnold as police search for driver after car collision
item.description: In the early hours of Saturday, 9 May 2026, a red Vauxhall Astra struck multiple pedestrians in Market Place, Arnold, Nottinghamshire, resulting in several hospitalisations. One victim is reported to ...

item.title: Uncertainty Persists in Tamil Nadu as Vijay Seeks Majority Support for Government Formation
item.description: Tamil Nadu’s post-election political situation has turned highly uncertain despite actor-politician C Joseph Vijay emerging as the single-largest winner in the recent Assembly elections. His party, Ta...
